name: Research Agent
description: Autonomous web research and scraping agent. Searches the web via Google (Serper API), fetches and reads full page content, triangulates multiple sources, synthesises comprehensive responses. Three modes: 'research' for deep multi-source investigation, 'scrape' for targeted data extraction, 'api_scout' for producing code-ready API integration specs. Can save research artifacts to shared workspace (SAVE_ARTIFACT) and recall prior research (RECALL_ARTIFACT) to avoid redundant work.

input.task: natural language description of what to research or scrape

metadata.mode: research | scrape | api_scout — defaults to research
metadata.session_id: injected by god agent for workspace scoping

output.result: the research output with source citations, or structured API spec
output.next_hint: optional — what the next agent should do with this output
